summary: A collection of X (Twitter) posts by Jeff Dean, primarily focused on announcing Google AI milestones like Gemini and Gemma, sharing Waymo safety statistics, and highlighting the importance of AI efficiency.

principles.rationale: Understanding and measuring the environmental impact of AI inference is necessary to manage its energy footprint.
principles.source_quote: AI efficiency is important. Today, Google is sharing a technical paper detailing our comprehensive methodology for measuring the environmental impact of Gemini inference.

signature_quotes.context: Introducing a technical paper on measuring the environmental impact of Gemini inference.
